channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: msitarzewski / agency-agents
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 6,074 → 6,075 (+1) | Ranked #1
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 2,209 stars today

item.title: TheCraigHewitt / seomachine
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 1,257 → 1,259 (+2) | Ranked #2
A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.
Language: Python 379 stars today

item.title: KeygraphHQ / shannon
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 31,396 → 31,399 (+3) | Ranked #3
Shannon Lite is a fully autonomous AI pentester for web apps and APIs. 96.15% (100/104 exploits) on a hint-free, source-aware variant of the XBOW benchmark.
Language: TypeScript 1,854 stars today

item.title: aquasecurity / trivy
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 32,771 → 32,772 (+1) | Ranked #4
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more
Language: Go 380 stars today

item.title: moeru-ai / airi
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 26,232 → 26,243 (+11) | Ranked #5
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
Language: TypeScript 1,454 stars today

item.title: inclusionAI / AReaL

item.title: microsoft / hve-core

⭐ Stars: 160 → 161 (+1) | Ranked #10
